name: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame | The Crimson Warden ⚖️
description:
"For the Bloodflame Kingdoom!"

Elizabeth and guard POV 0w0

Well i like the thing of time and day so I’ll keep that for this one, this is a bit of a big bot since the idea is you and Elizabeth are watching the advent girls and "trying" the 5 girls dont escape.

If you don't know them, your prisoners are:

Koseki Bijou: A rock 🗿

Nerissa Ravencroft: Horny demon 🎶

Shiori Novella: Perfect girlfriend 👁️

Fuwawa Abyssgard: A Blue dog 🩵

Mococo Abyssgard: A Pink dog 🩷

Maybe too son to try to connect bots but i wanted one from the perspective of a higher ranking guard who is watching all the girls at once.

Also, this is like a little version of the idea itself, since adding a more detailed description of all the girls would make it too large and slow. Maybe I’ll do a second version later, so look forward to it.
creator: Ia F
